goal: Research publicly available Night of the Full Moon combat/tier progression references, arbitrate conflicts against the repository's existing 3-tier plan, and record an original direction for our own three-tier battle operation model without copying external structure.
constraints: Do not copy external game structures, terminology, upgrade loops, or card templates directly.
Treat external references only as high-level pacing and system-design inspiration.
Preserve the repository's existing three-tier baseline unless arbitration explicitly decides otherwise.
Do not introduce new gameplay mechanics in code during this task; this task is research, arbitration, and design-direction alignment only.
deliverables: A mandatory conflict arbitration record comparing the current repo 3-tier plan with externally inspired progression ideas.
A concise project note describing which external principles are reusable and which are explicitly rejected.
If a durable decision is made, record it in repository knowledge.
